summary: Verified dialog rendering fix for Desktop modal/dialog rendering problem. All critical tests PASSED: Forgot Password dialog, StudentProfileModal, Notes dialog, and Rating dialog all render correctly ABOVE the overlay on both Desktop (1920px) and Mobile (375px). The fix removed the wrapper div that was breaking Radix's click-outside detection.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue, not blocking
Console warning: Encountered two children with the same key - React key warning in monthly attendance chart, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: dialog.jsx fix - Removed wrapper div that broke Radix Dialog's click-outside detection
VERIFIED: DialogContent uses 'fixed inset-x-4 top-[50%] -translate-y-[50%] mx-auto' for RTL-safe centering
VERIFIED: Forgot Password Dialog - Desktop centered (diff: 0px), Mobile centered (diff: 16px)
VERIFIED: StudentProfileModal - Desktop centered (diff: 0px), width: 896px (max-w-4xl working)
VERIFIED: Notes Dialog - Desktop visible and centered
VERIFIED: Rating Dialog - Desktop and Mobile visible and centered
VERIFIED: All dialogs appear ABOVE the dark overlay (z-index correct)
VERIFIED: Dialogs do NOT close immediately after opening (no auto-close bug)
seed_data_creation: Created test sessions for teacher to test dialogs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dialog rendering fix verified. The wrapper div removal in dialog.jsx fixed the Radix Dialog click-outside detection issue. All dialogs (Forgot Password, StudentProfileModal, Notes, Rating) now render correctly above the overlay on both Desktop and Mobile viewports.

verified_features.dialog_above_overlay: PASSED - All dialogs render above dark overlay
verified_features.no_auto_close_bug: PASSED - Dialogs stay open until explicitly closed

root_cause_analysis.issue: Desktop modal/dialog rendering problem - overlay appeared but dialog content was hidden
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Previous fix wrapped DialogPrimitive.Content inside an extra <div> for flex centering. This broke Radix Dialog's click-outside detection, causing the dialog to immediately close when opened.
root_cause_analysis.fix_applied: Removed the wrapper div. Content is now a direct sibling of Overlay (correct Radix structure). Uses 'inset-x-4 top-[50%] -translate-y-[50%] mx-auto' for centering, which works in RTL because inset-x sets physical left+right and mx-auto centers with physical margins.
root_cause_analysis.verification: All dialogs tested on Desktop (1920px) and Mobile (375px) - all render correctly above overlay and stay open
